backend/main.mo: Motoko actor that stores hotel leads in a map with auto-incrementing IDs, exposing functions to submit, retrieve, and sort leads by name or creation time.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that the logo text in SiteHeader.tsx and SiteFooter.tsx was updated to display in solid primary blue.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of all frontend source files to one-sentence descriptions, serving as a quick reference for the project's component and page structure.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for the light and dark color themes used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell with a root div and module script tag that bootstraps the React application.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Sets up TanStack Router with six routes (Home, Services, About, Results, Pricing, Contact) nested under a shared SiteLayout root route.
frontend/src/components/leads/LeadCaptur: Lead capture form component using react-hook-form that collects hotel contact details, submits them to the backend, and shows a success confirmation on completion.
frontend/src/components/leads/useSubmitL: Custom React hook that wraps the backend actor's submitLead call with loading and error state management.
frontend/src/components/marketing/Callou: Reusable card component that visually highlights a quote with a Quote icon and styled gradient background.
frontend/src/components/marketing/CaseSt: Placeholder card with a dashed border and 'Coming Soon' label used to reserve space for future case studies.
frontend/src/components/marketing/Pricin: Reusable pricing card displaying tier name, price label, description, feature checklist, and a CTA button with optional 'Most Popular' badge for featured tiers.
frontend/src/components/marketing/Primar: Reusable CTA button group rendering 'Get Free Consultation' and 'Book Strategy Call' buttons that both navigate to the contact page's audit form anchor.
frontend/src/components/marketing/Result: Displays three key performance metrics (40% bookings, 25% revenue, 70% operations reduction) in a responsive card grid with icons.
frontend/src/components/marketing/Servic: Card component that renders a service category title with a bulleted checklist of service offerings.
Renders the site-wide footer with brand info, navigation links split into two columns, social media icons, contact details, and a WhatsApp link driven by siteConfig.
Sticky site header with desktop navigation links and CTA buttons, plus a mobile slide-out Sheet menu; navigates to the contact page audit form on CTA clicks.
Top-level layout wrapper that composes SiteHeader, SiteFooter, and WhatsAppButton around a router Outlet, and handles smooth scroll-to-top or hash-anchor navigation on route changes.
frontend/src/components/site/WhatsAppBut: Fixed floating action button that opens the WhatsApp link in a new tab when enabled in siteConfig, or navigates to the contact page as a fallback.
frontend/src/config/siteConfig.ts: Exports a siteConfig object containing WhatsApp integration settings (enabled flag and link), currently disabled.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (anonymous or authenticated) via React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports React Query hooks (useGetAllLeads, useGetLeadsByCreatedAt) that fetch lead data from the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for a dark-blue color palette in both light and dark modes, plus base body styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: About page displaying Evanka Hospitality's company story, founder bio, city presence, philosophy quote, and investment vision using Card components and icons.
frontend/src/pages/ContactPage.tsx: Contact page displaying company contact info (email, phone, locations) alongside a LeadCaptureSection form component for hotel business inquiries.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Home page featuring a hero section, a grid of five core service cards, and a benefits list, with CTA and metrics strip components.
frontend/src/pages/PricingPage.tsx: Pricing page rendering three custom-quote tiers (Starter, Professional, Enterprise) via PricingTierCard components, with a CTA section linking to the contact page.
frontend/src/pages/ResultsPage.tsx: Results page showcasing client achievement metrics via ResultsMetricsStrip and three placeholder case study cards.
frontend/src/pages/ServicesPage.tsx: Services page listing five hospitality service categories (OTA, revenue management, automation, Airbnb, lead generation) as ServiceCategoryCard components with a CTA to the contact page.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with oklch-based design tokens, custom fonts (Inter, Merriweather), accordion animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Project state metadata tracking version, existing features, and a pending feature request (AR-1) to change the logo text to full blue in SiteHeader and SiteFooter.
